$comment: Landmark photography for the homepage hero + gallery strip. Drop real, licensed photos into public/img/dubai/ using these filenames — entries whose file is missing are skipped automatically at build time. Order matters: first existing image leads the hero slideshow.

images.altEn: Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai illuminated at night
images.altAr: برج خليفة ووسط مدينة دبي مضاءً ليلًا

images.altEn: Burj Al Arab on the Jumeirah shoreline
Dubai Marina towers lit up at night
Burj Khalifa rising over Downtown Dubai
images.altAr: برج خليفة يعلو وسط مدينة دبي

images.altEn: Burj Al Arab illuminated at night
Dubai skyline along Sheikh Zayed Road at night
images.altAr: أفق دبي على شارع الشيخ زايد ليلًا

images.altEn: Dubai Creek Harbour skyline at sunset
